page: Amazon Web Services i7ie.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8559C processors built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 vCPUs, derived from 24 physical cores with 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.6 GHz and supported by a 320 MB L3 cache. The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of DDR5 memory running at 6 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is a primary feature of this instance, offering 30,000 GB of high-throughput NVMe SSD capacity. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance across data-intensive workloads. The server achieves top-tier status in Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores, as well as static web serving throughput at 89.31 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 224.54 GB/sec for large-block read-only operations. Database performance is robust, with Passmark database operations scoring 26,466.5 and Redis SET operations reaching 71.48 million operations per second. Additionally, the CPU supports Advanced Matrix Extensions, enabling strong performance in local processing tasks.

Given the massive 30 TB local NVMe SSD storage and 384 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory, this server offers high resource density for storage-heavy applications. It provides a qualitatively cost-efficient profile for workloads requiring high-throughput local storage without the latency of network-attached volumes. The instance is highly suited for large-scale relational and non-relational databases, high-performance web serving, data warehousing, and local data processing tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8559C processors with 48 vCPUs and 384.0 GB of DDR5 memory. This configuration features a massive 30,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, the instance delivers top-tier benchmark results, including a Geekbench multi-core score of 20,458.0 and static web serving throughput of 89.31 GB/sec. It also demonstrates strong database capabilities, processing 71.48 million Redis SET operations per second. The inclusion of Advanced Matrix Extensions accelerates workloads like local inference. This server is optimized for large-scale databases, high-throughput data warehousing, and intensive local storage operations.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB DDR5 RAM, and 30,000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier database and web serving performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services i7ie.12xlarge features 48 vCPUs, 384 GB DDR5 RAM, and 30 TB of local NVMe SSD storage for high-throughput database workloads.
tagline: A storage-optimized platform featuring thirty terabytes of local NVMe SSD storage and high-speed DDR5 memory for intensive database workloads.
bullet_points: 48 vCPUs powered by dedicated 3.6 GHz Intel Xeon 8559C processors
384.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory running at 6 GHz
30,000 GB of high-throughput local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier performance in static web serving and database operations
